pages.text: A $(bold)PreFab$() is an upgraded Compact Machine block that acts as a $(bold)cross-dimensional conduit$(). It routes resources between the Overworld and the Compact Machines dimension, measures production rates, and can run factories "virtually" using math.

pages.title: Key Features
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)6 Independent Faces$(): Each face (North, South, East, West, Up, Down) can be configured separately $(li)$(bold)No Internal Storage$(): PreFabs are routers, not chests - resources transport instantly $(li)$(bold)State Machine$(): Controls when factory is loaded vs. unloaded (BUILDING/SIMULATING/CACHED/HALTED) $(li)$(bold)Rate Caching$(): Measures actual production rates, then simulates them mathematically $(li)$(bold)Chunk Unloading$(): CM dimension chunks stay unloaded during CACHED mode (performance gain)
